---
title: "Statistics, hypothesis testing, and the prop.test"
author: "..."
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## The grittier the service-people, the better the defense.

<https://angeladuckworth.com/grit-scale/>

![](images/clipboard-1281119606.png)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Probability and Statistics at West Point?

--

Chalkboards

![](images/clipboard-3451157102.png)

(and actually every class)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> For survey of 161 individuals on willingness to serve as organ doners in the case of an accident, is there evidence that responses rate differs from a 50/50 split, when 53 individuals respond 'no' and 108 individuals respond 'yes'?

------------------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r, echo = F}
library(tidyverse)

isi_donor_url <- "https://www.isi-stats.com/isi/data/prelim/OrganDonor.txt"

donor <- read_delim(isi_donor_url) %>%
  select(Default, Choice) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(decision = ifelse(Choice == "donor", "donor (1)", "not (0)")) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(decision = fct_rev(decision)) 
```

# 

### 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggprop.test)

donor |>
  ggplot() + 
  aes(x = decision) 

last_plot() +
  geom_stack() 

last_plot() + 
  geom_stack_label() 

last_plot() +
  geom_support() 

last_plot() +
  geom_prop() 

last_plot() +
  geom_prop_label() 

last_plot() +
  stamp_prop() 

last_plot() +
  stamp_prop_label()



last_plot() + 
  stamp_eq_norm_prop()



last_plot() +
  geom_normal_prop_null() 



last_plot() + 
  geom_normal_prop_null_sds() 


```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(tidyverse.quiet = TRUE)
```

## Intro Thoughts

## Status Quo

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

```

## Experiment

```{r}

```

## Closing remarks, Other Relevant Work, Caveats
